have h_zero : IsAdmissible 0 := by
    intro A _ _
    use ∅
    simp only [Set.empty_subset, Set.ncard_empty, algebraMap.coe_zero, mul_eq_zero, le_refl, true_and]
    intros _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
    trivial
  have h_le_zero : ∀ c, IsAdmissible c → c ≤ 0 := by
    intro c hc
    by_contra h
    have gyle95 : ∀ n : ℕ, ∃ A : Set ℝ, A.Finite ∧ A.ncard = n ∧ ∀ B ⊆ A, B.ncard = 4 → (B - B).ncard = 11 := sorry
    obtain ⟨A, hfin, hcard, hA⟩ := gyle95 (⌈4 / c⌉₊)
    obtain ⟨S, hsub, hSidon, hSc⟩ := hc hfin hA
    have : S.ncard ≤ 3 := by
      by_contra hS
      push_neg at hS
      obtain ⟨B, hBS, hBcard⟩ := Set.Finite.exists_subset_card_eq (Set.Finite.subset hfin hsub) 4 hS
      have hBA : B ⊆ A := hBS.trans hsub
      have h11 := hA B hBA hBcard
      have hSidonB : IsSidon B := fun _ ha _ hb _ hc _ hd => hSidon (hBS ha) (hBS hb) (hBS hc) (hBS hd)
      have h13 : (B - B).ncard = 13 := sorry
      linarith
    have : 4 ≤ c * A.ncard := by
      rw [hcard]
      calc (4 : ℝ) = c * (4 / c) := by field_simp [linarith]
        _ ≤ c * ⌈4 / c⌉₊ := by gcongr; exact Nat.le_ceil _
    linarith
  apply le_antisymm
  · apply csSup_le ⟨0, h_zero⟩ h_le_zero
  · apply le_csSup ⟨0, h_le_zero⟩ h_zero

        · simp; obtain ⟨_, _, _, _, hne⟩ := exists_pair_ne A (by linarith); exact hne
